string_table:
%C[210,90,0,255] Stalkers: \n %C[Default] Eh ... It is a pity that he died. Thank you for finding it.
%C[226,90,0,255] Note: \n %C[Default] new additional tasks appeared on the bulletin board in the camp on the checkpoint.
%C[226,90,0,255] Note: \n %C[Default] Additional tasks can also be taken on the board of ads in the camp on the checkpoint.
%C[210,90,255] Solomon: \n %C[Default] Sorry and goodbye, brother.
%C[210,90,0,255] Carp: \n %C[Default] All are dead, good. Cut this installation!
%C[255,248,153,26] Forester: \n %C[Default] CLAP, Hi! How are you there? Listen, I'm waiting for you on the checkpoint. There are important news for you!
%C[255,248,153,26] Stalker: \n %C[Default] man, help, please! I am very close, I can't handle it myself, please!
%C[210,90,0,255] Unknown: \n %C[Default] gloomy, you need to meet. \n I will wait for you at the P-i factory. Check that there is no tail behind you.
Start a new game
A few hours later ...
Go to the metro laboratory?
You still can't go there.
You cannot leave the underground complex yet. You just came.
For respect for you among local stalkers, personal supplies have been added to your personal box in the CPP camp.
For help in the destruction of dangerous mutants, personal supplies have been added to your personal box in the checkpoint camp.
Attention! ... * hissing * ... above the red forest, the Mi-24 helicopter with a whole crew of mercenaries fell ... * hissing * ... immediately send all the next detachments to search for them. If survivors are detected, eliminate. Order of the SBU. End of communication.
Closed Channel of the military
Conductor
Unknown
Grandpa Checker
Cypress
Lame
Ring
Old man
Glock
Quiet
Lucifer
Perch
Spirit
Root
Doublet
Pathogenic
Tengiz
Professor Vlasov
Komarov
Zakhaev
They never left the territories of the Dome. \n apparently something happened ...
SECTOR 11 PRESENT
How stupid I will die, and in just a few minutes. \n Damn, this will be my last letter to someone. \n gloomy, I hope you could get to Pripyat, and was able to disrupt the military deal. \n I just want to believe that everything was done not in vain. \n I have nothing to be ashamed, I was a simple soldier, my country ...
My conscience is unsuccessful. \n I fulfilled my duty.
All the documentation found in the secret complex C11 was analyzed, and later destroyed. \n lame - was no longer a threat to humanity. \n Quiet - turned out to be a traitor, his fate is in the future unknown. \n, however, someone says that he was seen among the detachment of mercenaries, who for some reason kept a course on the agropom. \n over time, scientists have unraveled the secret of the noosphere. \n after which a large operation began. \n in the plan of which the task was set: to destroy the zone, using the "NK" –radet. \n a capsule-rack of this type: should absorb and destroy all organic and not organic within a radius of 20 kilometers. \n the body of Glok, never found whether he is alive or not is unknown. However, at the entrance to the complex, at the door, lay a sheet with a signature, at the end of which it was written: Glock S.R. 1987-2016. \n sergeant Reznov, was presented to the award Savior of the World, posthumously. \n now everything that reminds of it is photographs in the muddy framework at the honorary stand of the special museum.
How quickly people forget that the course of history can change by the will of one person. \n (c) Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3
End.
Epilogue:
Thanks to GSC for the game S.T.A.L.K.E.R.
::::::::::::: V.I.V.I.E.N.T. TeaM :::::::::::::
Owner of modification heroes: \n Vladislav Khalimov AKA Night Guard \n Oleg Kuzma AKA Slesar6razriada \n Ivan Yaskevich North
Maylay
GefoS
Ralocks
Thanks to the rebel for one of the underground locations.
Thanks to everyone whose work was included in this modification. And we ask you to forgive if someone suddenly forgot.
Thanks Den_Stash: models, scripts.
Отдельное јмајило: \n shower \n Rulix \n moskir \n Swm Team \n Nttw12_Monstr \n tris \n rlack \n xahtep \n gramaatik \n Arc \n Naxac \n Fantomicw \n Makdm \n Crezy-exe \n Rednike \n Kelvirax \n MSG Mod \n Gaz1k \n Nttw1236vrn \n Singapur22 \n Stalk15 \n Alex1197 \n spin_tires \n valery publickov \n GREADFIASCO \n
• SECTOR 11 •
The head of the team. Screenwriter.
Graphics.
Animations.
Verkhuvka editing.
Wait for new modifications ...
Audron
Gravel
Pulle
LEVEL designer.
;--------------------------------------------------------------;титры
My task was to destroy one very "bad" and influential person in the Chernobyl zone of alienation. Perhaps later ... I will regret the done.
Actions take place at the time of the beginning of the plot "Contract for a good life."
In the zone spring. 2016. March.
SECTOR: 11
V.I.V.I.E.N.T.- Team represents
Sergeant Reznov. Call: Glock. Military.
Task: Find and destroy the former representative of O-Consciousness:
Nickname: lame. \n biography: unknown. \n danger: a deadly threat to all of humanity. \n place of events: Chernobyl zone of alienation.
Who I am, how I got into the zone and for what is it that it doesn't matter. \n I tell this because I repent, in the deed. \n is the culprit of what happened in the future. \n me to judge? \n, after all, I, already, a corpse ...
I knew that everything would go wrong - as it should. \n the transaction is broken, but what valuable is still unknown. Need to dump.
I hid the case, as I asked the quiet. \n had to suffer with the elevator mine ... But I did it.
%C[255,216,1,0] Quiet \n %C[Default] %C[255,255,128,0] Channel of the military \n %C[Default] Caravan has arrived! \n glock, take a detachment and to the gathering place. Run!
%C[255,216,1,0] Quiet \n %C[Default] %C[255,255,128,0] Channel of the military \n %C[Default] to help! We are under dense fire! ... We are in the catacombs! We ask for help! SOS!
%c[255,216,1,0]V.I.V.I.E.N.T. TEAM \n %c[default]%c[255,255,128,0]4ECTOR: \n %c[default]SECTOR-11 PRESENT.
Quest hero
%C[255,248,153,26] There is no fur coat in place. He fulfills your order

Epilogue: finish the started \n place of events: the complex "Laboratory X" \n Time 22:12
Prologue: ashes to dust \n Place of events: the surroundings of the "Dome" \n time 21:44
V.I.V.I.E.N.T.- Team represents: \n a contract for a new life.
Old checkpoint. \n camp "Stalkers". \n the surroundings "Dome".
Act One: Spider thread
Act second: other people's steps
Act Third: Blood Thirst
Act Four: on the bones of the fallen
Act Fifth: One Warrior in the Field
%C[255,1,255,255] The main task
%C[255,238,153,26] Side task
%C[255,248,153,26] You can't sleep - enemies around!

%C[255,248,153,26] Turn off the radio ($$ACTION_USE$$)
Metro complex-15. The laboratory was found.
Epilogue - finish what has begun
Epilogue - The choice is made
Epilogue - The door is destroyed
Prologue - dust to dust
Prologue - evacuation

%C[226,90,0,255] Note: \n %C[Default] Scientists can modernize some artifacts you found.
%C[0.140.140.140] Professor Ozersky: \n %C[Default] Young man, your artifact is ready, you can safely pick it up.
%C[210,90,0,255] Note: \n %C[Default] added new notes about this territory. \n dop. Information in your PDA.
%C[255,248,153,26] Stalker died: \n %C[Default] Sergeant Reznov (Glock)
83 days before ...
Brain condition: deadly
Place of events: Psi-radiation plant
Basic task: get out of the zone

Tumor: 23.06 mm
Chance to die: 91%

Exercise:
The Stalker bar is still closed to visiting.
Go to the Sector-11 complex?
Go to the dungeon "Stalker bar"?
Go to the surface?
Go to the dungeon "Complex Metro-15"?
Leave the complex?
The Metro Complex-15 is still closed to visiting.
Collector leading in the C-11 complex
The path to Pripyat is closed.
The path to Pripyat
The path to the outskirts of the zone
Do not fall asleep in this place. You need to find a more reliable shelter, where you can wait out the ejection.
